shims.minimal_interface: SQLAlchemy DeclarativeBase + shared MetaData/naming-convention; the root all ORM models inherit.

SqlalchemyBase: async CRUD mixin — create/read/update/delete/list_async with id, created_at/updated_at, soft-delete, and actor/org scoping. The heaviest glue; kai-chattr writes its own slim base (no org multi-tenancy).
OrganizationMixin/ProjectMixin: inject organization_id/project_id FK columns for Letta multi-tenancy. kai-chattr replaces with its own scoping (likely workspace_id or none for v1).
SQLAlchemy TypeDecorators for JSON/embedding/enum columns. Port only the decorators the kept models actually use (Block/Identity).
Registers SQLite vector/distance functions for embedding search. DEFER — kai-chattr decides its own embedding seam later (not needed for identity+block v1).
Pydantic side of the sqlite vector functions. DEFER with the embedding seam.
Shared enums (e.g. MessageRole, AgentType). Copy ONLY the few enums the kept Block/Identity schemas reference; do not lift the whole file.

externals.notes: Same ORM in kai-chattr services/ (async SQLAlchemy 2.x). Already the chosen backend; add to allowed-deps when the slice lands.
Schemas use pydantic v2; kai-chattr already standardizes on pydantic + pydantic-settings.
